name: Magi Magistratus
summary: Institutional body for magical investigation and law enforcement under Shirsh authority.
day_to_day: Reviews magical incidents, inspects suspicious artifacts, and manages formal investigations.
who_works_there: Magical magistrates, investigators, evidence clerks, celestial analysts.
who_uses_it: Petitioners, accused practitioners, other houses, scholars needing rulings.
authority: Can investigate magical misconduct and issue formal findings or actions.
public_manifestation: Case hearings, sealed evidence rooms, observatory-linked studies, quiet summons.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Arcane complexity makes justice slow, and politics tempt selective enforcement.
